skill.name: vision-analysis
skill.description: Analyze, describe, and extract information from images using the MiniMax vision MCP tool. Supports image description, OCR text extraction, UI design review, chart data extraction, and object detection.
skill.summary: Image analysis skill powered by MiniMax vision MCP, supporting multiple analysis modes for screenshots, charts, mockups, and photos.
skill.author: MiniMax-AI

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 81 patterns across external_commands, network, filesystem, and env_access categories. After manual evaluation, all findings are false positives. The SKILL.md file is markdown documentation that contains configuration examples and code snippets for users to follow. The static scanner incorrectly treated markdown code blocks as executable Ruby/shell code. No actual code execution, network requests, credential access, or cryptographic operations exist in this file. URLs reference legitimate MiniMax API endpoints and documentation pages. Environment variable references are instructional placeholders for user configuration. Risk score reduced from 100/100 to low after context evaluation.

low_findings.title: Static analyzer false positives on markdown code blocks
low_findings.description: The static scanner treated markdown code blocks in SKILL.md as executable code, generating 81 false positive findings. All detected patterns (external commands, network URLs, environment variables, filesystem paths, cryptographic algorithms) are documentation examples, not actual code. This indicates the scanner does not distinguish between markdown content and executable source files.

content.user_title: Analyze and describe images with AI vision
content.value_statement: Extract meaning from images without manual effort. This skill analyzes photos, screenshots, charts, and mockups using the MiniMax vision MCP to provide detailed descriptions, text extraction, and design feedback.
actual_capabilities: Generate detailed descriptions of images including subjects, settings, colors, and composition
Extract all visible text from screenshots and documents with preserved formatting (OCR)
Review UI mockups and wireframes with strengths, issues, and actionable improvement suggestions
Extract data points, axis labels, and trends from charts and graphs
Identify and locate objects, people, and activities within images
Support multiple image formats including JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP up to 20MB
limitations: Requires a MiniMax Token Plan subscription and valid API key
Depends on the MiniMax understand_image MCP tool being properly configured
Analysis quality depends on image resolution and clarity

use_cases.title: Accessibility support for visual content
use_cases.description: Generate detailed image descriptions to make visual content accessible to users who rely on screen readers or text-based interfaces.

use_cases.title: Automated data extraction from charts
use_cases.description: Convert visual charts and graphs into structured data points and trends for reports and analysis without manual transcription.
use_cases.target_user: Data analysts and business intelligence professionals

use_cases.title: UI design feedback automation
use_cases.description: Get structured design critiques with strengths, issues, and suggestions for interface mockups and wireframes before user testing.

prompt_templates.title: Describe an image
prompt_templates.prompt: Describe this image in detail. Include the main subject, background, colors, and any visible text.
prompt_templates.scenario: You want to understand what is shown in a photo or screenshot

prompt_templates.title: Extract text from a screenshot
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract all text visible in this image. Preserve the original formatting and structure. If no text is found, tell me.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need to copy text from an image, document scan, or screenshot

prompt_templates.title: Review a UI mockup
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this interface design. List the strengths, identify usability issues, and provide specific suggestions for improvement.
prompt_templates.scenario: You want design feedback on a wireframe or mockup before development

prompt_templates.title: Extract data from a chart
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract all data from this chart. Include the title, axis labels, data points with values, and a summary of the main trend.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need to convert a visual chart or graph into structured data

output: The image shows a web application dashboard with a dark sidebar on the left containing navigation links for Home, Analytics, Users, and Settings. The main area displays three metric cards at the top showing Total Revenue ($48,250), Active Users (1,847), and Conversion Rate (3.2%). Below the cards is a line chart showing revenue trends over the past 30 days with an upward trend.

output_examples.input: Extract all text from this error message screenshot
output: The server is temporarily unable to handle your request. Please try again in a few moments.
If the problem persists, contact support at support@example.com

best_practices: Use high-resolution images for better analysis results, especially for OCR and chart data extraction
Select the analysis mode that matches your goal to get the most relevant output from the vision model
Verify extracted text and data against the original image when accuracy is critical for your workflow
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for images containing sensitive information such as passwords, personal data, or confidential documents
Do not rely on OCR output for security-critical data without manual verification of the results
Do not assume the model can read handwritten text or severely degraded images with low contrast

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, and SVG formats. Images up to 20MB in size can be processed.

faq.question: Do I need a MiniMax subscription?
faq.answer: Yes. A MiniMax Token Plan subscription with a valid API key is required. The skill cannot be used with free-tier keys.

faq.question: Can this skill work with local image files?
faq.answer: Yes. Local file paths work if the MiniMax MCP is configured with file access permissions on your system.

faq.question: How do I set up the MiniMax MCP tool?
faq.answer: Run the setup command for your environment (Claude Code, Cursor, or OpenCode) with your API key. The skill provides exact configuration commands for each platform.

faq.question: Can this skill read handwritten text?
faq.answer: The model is optimized for printed text. Handwritten text may not be accurately recognized, especially with unusual handwriting styles.

faq.question: What analysis modes are available?
faq.answer: Five modes are available: describe (general image description), ocr (text extraction), ui-review (design critique), chart-data (data extraction from graphs), and object-detect (identify elements in images).
